title: Aggregate stats run over the unified frame that double-counts overlapping Brasileirão matches
evidence: data_loader.py:133 _build_unified concatenates 5 overlapping sources (brasileirao + historico 2003-2019 + extended all cover Brasileirão); query_engine.py:366 get_statistics and query_engine.py:159 get_team_record use all_matches without de-duplication, so 'Total Matches' / averages / W-L-D are inflated. Only get_standings (query_engine.py:245) dedupes by source.
suggestion: Apply the same single-source selection used in get_standings (or dedupe matches by date+teams) before computing team records and statistics.

title: Exposes six well-documented MCP tools, beyond the minimum required capabilities
evidence: server.py:23-169 registers search_matches, head_to_head, get_team_record, get_standings, search_players, get_statistics as @mcp.tool() handlers with full docstrings.

title: search_players cannot filter on overall rating of 0 (sentinel collides with valid value)
evidence: server.py:139-140 passes `min_overall or None` / `max_overall or None`, so a caller passing 0 is indistinguishable from 'no filter'. Harmless in practice (ratings are 40+).
suggestion: Use -1 / explicit None sentinels if 0 ever becomes a meaningful bound.
